title: Release-channel policy: preview eligibility for all buildable products
description: Machine-readable release-channel policy. Defines the stable / preview / advanced-preview channel tiers and the rules that gate each tier, plus the preview-release eligibility matrix for every buildable Sense360 firmware target. Lack of hardware proof blocks STABLE only; it does not block PREVIEW artifact eligibility. This file is policy + eligibility metadata. It is read by tests/test_release_channel_policy.py.

scope.notes: Docs/config only. This PR records eligibility and policy. Actual preview artifact publication (a webflash-builds.json entry + wrapper + release tag) is a separate, explicitly scoped follow-up per target. config/webflash-builds.json remains the sole release-eligibility source of truth.

preview.label: Preview
preview.meaning: Buildable and installable for testers. NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, NOT a customer default.

advanced-preview.label: Advanced preview
advanced-preview.meaning: Preview plus stronger warnings for risky / mains-voltage installs. Competent-person, manual-install only. Same non-stable / non-recommended / non-default guarantees as preview, with mandatory mains-risk warning copy.

warning_copy.preview: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
warning_copy.advanced-preview: ADVANCED PREVIEW — MAINS-VOLTAGE RISK. This firmware drives mains-voltage hardware (e.g. TRIAC phase-control dimming) and is for competent persons performing a manual installation only. It is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and is NEVER a default. No bench evidence and no electrical-safety / compliance certification is claimed. Incorrect installation can cause fire, electric shock, or death. Do not install unless you are qualified to work on mains wiring.

preview_release_matrix.notes: Existing live v1.0.0 stable. Stable path is unchanged by this policy. A preview successor (e.g. a future v1.x preview) is permitted under the preview tier but is not published in this PR.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: S360-410 PoE-PSU schematic verification + AirIQ sensor-stack bench evidence
preview_release_matrix.notes: Buildable combination (compile-only skeleton today). Preview-eligible; not hardware verified. AirIQ/VentIQ remain mutually exclusive.
Smallest RoomIQ-only PoE bundle. Preview-eligible; not hardware verified.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: S360-410 PoE-PSU schematic verification + LED preview-to-stable gauntlet
preview_release_matrix.notes: Living-room target. RoomIQ + LED ring (SELV). A dedicated product/wrapper YAML is still required before a preview artifact can be cut. Preview-eligible once that exists; not hardware verified.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: S360-410 PoE-PSU schematic verification + LED preview-to-stable gauntlet
preview_release_matrix.notes: Corridor target shares the Living-room Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ-LED firmware. Preview-eligible once a product/wrapper YAML exists; not hardware verified.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: LED preview-to-stable gauntlet (operator flash proof, bench verification, stable promotion)
preview_release_matrix.notes: Already published on the preview channel (status: preview, channel: preview, webflash_build_matrix: true). No LED-stable claim.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: Mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance evidence + competent-person sign-off + GPIO3 strap-pin boot characterisation
preview_release_matrix.notes: Relay-switched fan. Buildable (validated-full-compile). Preview-eligible with warning; carries the relay/mains caveat. Not stable, not recommended, not default.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: Measured current / thermal evidence (S360-311-CURRENT-THERMAL-001); RPM/TachIO not claimed (rpm_supported: false)
preview_release_matrix.notes: Native ESP32-S3 GPIO PWM path is compile-proven. Current/thermal not measured; RPM not claimed. Preview-eligible with warning. Legacy SX1509 path remains superseded.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: Cloudlift S12 / J3 harness + product-bench evidence; S360-312 schematic / BOM
preview_release_matrix.notes: 0-10V DAC fan control. Buildable (validated-full-compile); enforces FanDAC <-> AirIQ mutex. Not Cloudlift-ready. Preview-eligible with warning. No compliance claim.

preview_release_matrix.stable_blocker: HW-005 (S360-320 schematic; GPIO5/6 collision; ac_dimmer cannot run across SX1509) + PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 + COMPLIANCE-001 mains-voltage review
preview_release_matrix.notes: Mains-voltage TRIAC phase control. Advanced-preview ONLY: never stable, never recommended, never default. Requires the advanced mains-risk warning copy. Built (when published) on the preview build channel with the advanced acknowledgement gate. HW-005 / GPIO routing must still be resolved before a preview artifact is cut.

rescue_ownership.note: Rescue firmware is WebFlash-owned and tracked separately. It is not a Sense360 release-channel product and is out of scope for this policy.
